title: AT&T's CEO Shrugs Off Starlink Threat, Talks Up Growing Fiber Network
summary: Since 2020, I've covered the launch and explosive growth of SpaceX's Starlink satellite internet service, writing 600+ stories on availability and feature launches, but also the regulatory battles over the expansion of satellite constellations, fights with rival providers like AST SpaceMobile and…
